root_cause.concrete: Did not know microservice JWT should use asymmetric algorithm (RS256)
root_cause.abstract: When choosing crypto algorithms, failed to consider deployment architecture security constraints

user_correction.description: User pointed out microservices should not share symmetric keys

attribution_a.argument: RS256 is objectively better for multi-service architectures because it eliminates shared secret distribution

attribution_b.argument: HS256 could work if API gateway centralizes verification

generalization_ladder.L1: In Express microservice JWT auth, use RS256 not HS256 when multiple services verify tokens
generalization_ladder.L2: Microservice architectures require asymmetric JWT algorithms to avoid shared secret distribution
generalization_ladder.L3: Deployment architecture constrains cryptographic algorithm choice

missed_signals.why_missed: Focused on function structure, did not cross-validate algorithm choice against architecture

value_rationale: RS256 vs HS256 knowledge is valid regardless of task outcome
